evaluators.name: Collect 5 'Invoice_2024' PDFs into 'Invoices 2024' and star it - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a folder 'Invoices 2024' was created under Documents, starred, and exactly 5 qualifying 'Invoice_2024' PDFs from Documents were moved into it.

evaluators.name: Share 'Project Alpha' folder with viewer/editor and restricted expiring link - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the qualifying project folder under Projects has viewer 'alex_viewer' and editor 'jamie_editor' collaborators with download allowed, and a restricted share link for invited people only that expires by end of 2025 with edit permission.

evaluators.name: Archive 2 largest qualifying videos and permanently delete the 3rd - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Uses instrumentation to ensure the user filtered for large video files (>=500 MB), identified the top 3 by size, moved the largest two into Videos/Archive, and permanently deleted the third-largest.

evaluators.name: Create public view-only, no-download link for root PDF expiring by end of June 2025 - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the single top-level PDF has a public link allowing view-only, no download, with an expiration on or before June 30, 2025.

evaluators.name: Move 3 newest recent 'Q3' spreadsheets into 'Reports/Q3 Reports' - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that a 'Q3 Reports' subfolder exists under Reports and that the three most recently modified qualifying 'Q3' spreadsheets (within the last 60 days) are inside it.

evaluators.name: Restore Roadmap.docx to newer January 2024 version - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the only top-level document with version history ('Roadmap.docx') is restored so that the newer January 2024 version is current and file metadata reflects that.

evaluators.name: Make 2 most recently opened PDFs and newest project folder available offline - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Ensures that the two most recently opened PDFs in Recent are marked available offline, and that the most recently modified project subfolder is also available offline.

evaluators.name: Disable download for newest shared file's viewer and label it Confidential - Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that in 'Shared with me', the most recently shared file (not folder) has download disabled for its viewer collaborator and has the 'Confidential' label applied.
